chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 611 of 2017 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) D/o Matter 1. For orders on CMA No.906/2026 2. For orders on CMA No.9988/2025 20.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Ali, Advocate for the petitioner. ------------------------------------ 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application, the petitioner has prayed for recalling of order dated 17.04.2025, whereby the instant petition was dismissed for non-prosecution along with the pending applications. Along with the application, the petitioner has filed her affidavit stating therein that on 17.04.2025 she was not well and despite best efforts she could not contact her advocate. Since the ground of ailment is taken, the application is allowed. The matter stands restored to its original position as it was on 17.04.2025. Issue notice to the respondents as well as the DAG for 02.02.2026. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
